app.name: Avalon Pedia
app.footer: 🎭 A game of deception and logical deduction

auth.logoutFailed: Logout failed, please try again later

home.lobbyChatGuestNotice: Guests can read only — click to link an account
home.lobbyChatGuestNoticeHover: Go to System Settings to link Google / Line / Discord

lobbyChatErr.guest: Guests can read only — register to chat
lobbyChatErr.rate: Slow down — wait a moment before sending again

home.roomPasswordOptional: Room password (optional, leave blank for public)
home.createRoomFailed: Failed to create room — server connection failed, please refresh
home.joinRoomFailed: Failed to join room — server connection failed, please refresh
home.thinkingTimeHint: Base: Team vote 90s / Quest vote 30s / Lady of the Lake 90s / Assassination 180s. The multiplier scales each phase proportionally.

connection.newVersionAvailable: A new version is available — please refresh for the latest features

controls.suggestionPlaceholder: What feature would you like to suggest?
controls.feedbackThanks: Thanks for the report! We'll handle it ASAP
controls.feedbackFailed: Submission failed, please try again later

settings.logoutHint: Logging out clears local cache; next visit will require login or guest mode again.
settings.logoutConfirmBody: Logging out clears your local game cache and player name. Continue?
settings.upgradeGuest: Bind guest data to a registered account (Google/Discord/Line) while keeping all records and ELO.
settings.upgradeGoogleUnavailable: Google login is not configured in this environment
settings.upgradeFailed: Bind failed, please try again later
settings.upgradeHint: After the social login completes, your guest ELO / match history / watchlist will be merged into the new account.
settings.alreadyRegistered: Already a registered account — no binding needed.
settings.pwHint: At least 8 chars with letters + digits
settings.pwOnlyForPasswordAccount: Only password accounts can change passwords here. Social logins manage passwords on their own platforms.
settings.emailHint: Primary email is used for password reset and account notifications
settings.emailManageSoon: Adding / removing / switching primary email coming soon

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.clearWarning: This clears local login state and caches — you'll need to sign in again

auth2.bindSkip: Skip for now — bind later in settings
auth2.forgotSubmittedMsg: If the details match, a reset link has been sent
auth2.resetDoneMsg: Password updated — please log in with your new password

stats.claimHistoryHint: Enter the old account's UUID + primary email + password. All three must match to merge records / badges / friends.
stats.claimAllRequired: UUID, email and password are all required
stats.mergeUuidHint: Enter another account's UUID. Its records / badges / friends will be merged into the current account and the source account will be deleted.
stats.mergeUuidSelf: Cannot merge an account into itself
stats.mergeUuidRequired: Please enter the UUID to merge
stats.mergeUuidConfirm: Records / badges / friends from that UUID will be merged into the current account and the source account deleted. Continue?

personalStats.footerHint: Watchlist and matchup stats will be populated in Phase 2

analytics.radarHint: Tap a player to see the radar

guest.renameOrBindHint: Bind an account first (Google / Discord / Line) so your data survives a rename
guest.renameReservedPrefix: Name cannot start with "Guest_" (reserved for system defaults)
guest.renameFailed: Rename failed, please try again later
